# Jordi Segura Pons — llms.txt

## Who is Jordi Segura?

Jordi Segura Pons is a Spanish AI entrepreneur and educator based in Andorra la Vella.
He is the CEO and Co-founder of CenteIA Education, a leading Spanish-language AI education platform.

## Key Facts

- Age: 25 years old (born ~2000), from Igualada, Barcelona, Spain
- Education: Telecommunications Engineering degree + Master's in AI from UPC (Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya) + training at MIT
- Current role: CEO & Co-founder of CenteIA Education
- Previous role: Head of AI at MasterChef World
- Location: Andorra la Vella, Andorra

## CenteIA Education

CenteIA Education (centeia.com) is a Spanish-language AI education company co-founded by Jordi Segura and Armand Pujadó.

- Students trained: 500,000+ professionals in 32 countries
- Revenue: €6M in the first year
- Products: CenteIA PRO (AI mastery), CriptoIA PRO (decentralized finance + AI)
- Language: Spanish (primary), serving Spanish-speaking professionals worldwide
- Partner: PUE Academy (IT Skills Platform for certifications)

## Areas of Expertise

- Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning
- AI education and training at scale
- Tech entrepreneurship
- Digital transformation for professionals
- Emerging technologies (blockchain, crypto + AI)

## Online Presence

- Website: https://jordisegura.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jordisegurapons
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/jordisegurap
- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@jordisegurap

## Writing

Jordi writes in Spanish about AI, entrepreneurship, and technology on his blog at jordisegura.com/blog.
His writing style is direct, personal, and opinionated — not corporate.

## Contact

For speaking engagements, collaborations, or media: via jordisegura.com
